name: Transportation Solution Svc
owner_or_parent: independent (Transportation Solution Services LLC, dba Axel)
employees_est: 6 (per source list; likely more with drivers)
service_types: NEMT/medical, paratransit, student transportation (incl. special-needs), VA contracts
districts_or_customers: Ritenour School District; St. Louis-area Dept. of Mental Health; United Healthcare; area nursing homes; VA
recent_news: Squitieri (founded 7+ transport cos.; sold NEMT franchise network in 2014) relaunched as Transportation Solution Services dba Axel; won VA contract (2019).
fit_notes: Founder-led MO operator with active student-transport contracts (e.g., Ritenour SD) and special-needs NEMT capability; serial entrepreneur with prior exit (2014) suggests openness to sale. Modest scale but a credible St. Louis-metro tuck-in candidate for Summit's special-needs/alt-transport segment.

name: Manatee Mobility Vans
service_types: Wheelchair-accessible vehicle SALES, SERVICE, and RENTALS (authorized BraunAbility dealer); NOT a school-bus or student-transport contractor
districts_or_customers: Retail/consumer mobility customers; Bradenton-Sarasota-Tampa Bay region
recent_news: Listed as new Florida BraunAbility dealer (BLVD.com).
fit_notes: NOT A TUCK-IN TARGET. Manatee Mobility Vans is a BraunAbility WAV dealership/rental shop, not a contracted student-transport or NEMT operator. Out of scope for Summit School Services.

name: Mobility Independent Trnsprtn
principals: unknown (private; mgmt ~25 yrs industry experience per site)
service_types: Wheelchair-accessible van/mobility equipment SALES, SERVICE, and adaptive driving aids; NOT a school-bus or student-transport contractor
districts_or_customers: Retail mobility customers across York County PA and Mid-Atlantic (MD/PA)
recent_news: None material; listed in Adaptive Driving Alliance and Mobility Resource dealer directories.
website: https://www.mitscorp.com/ (operates as M.I.T.S. Corp; source list shows 'Blvd.Com' which is a dealer directory listing)
fit_notes: NOT A TUCK-IN TARGET. M.I.T.S. is a wheelchair-van dealership and adaptive-equipment vendor, not a transportation operator. Out of scope for Summit.

name: Global-Aid TRANSPORTATION LLC
service_types: Non-emergency medical transport (NEMT): stretcher, wheelchair, ambulatory; long-distance medical transfers; hospice/dialysis/nursing-home runs. NO school-bus or student-transport offering identified.
districts_or_customers: Orange County FL / Greater Orlando: hospitals, rehab centers, skilled nursing, adult day care, dialysis, hospice
recent_news: Operates 24/7; ~230 reviews on Birdeye; no M&A activity identified.
fit_notes: Very small, founder-run NEMT shop (~5 employees). No school-district contracts identified; doesn't fit Summit's student-transportation tuck-in thesis. Possible adjacency only if Summit expands into Florida NEMT/special-needs medical transport.

name: Health Ride Plus Inc
owner_or_parent: Beacon Mobility (PE-backed by Audax Private Equity)
fleet_size_est: unknown (transports ~250 passengers/day across 9 western PA counties)
employees_est: 100-249 (per public profile; source list employee count of 8 is for one location only)
service_types: NEMT (ambulatory, wheelchair-van, stretcher, lift-van); paratransit; medical/social/recreational trips. Not a traditional yellow-school-bus contractor.
districts_or_customers: 9 counties in Western PA; trips as far as Pittsburgh, Danville, Philadelphia; medical/hospital/dialysis/social-service clients
recent_news: Acquired by/part of Beacon Mobility family of companies (Beacon is Audax-backed and has rolled up multiple PA paratransit/NEMT operators).
fit_notes: NOT A TUCK-IN TARGET. Already PE-owned via Beacon Mobility (Audax) - a direct competitor in special-needs/alt student transport. Disqualified.
